row.title: Selective demolition & rough-in
row.description: Remove existing finishes and complete rough framing, plumbing, or electrical work needed for the updated kitchen layout.

row.title: Cabinet installation
row.description: Install cabinetry, secure boxes in the planned layout, and prepare for final countertop or trim work.

row.title: Countertops & surface finishes
row.description: Install countertops, backsplash, and the major kitchen surface finishes that complete the cabinetry phase.

baseRows.title: Walls, waterproofing & tile
baseRows.description: Prep surfaces, waterproof wet areas, and install tile finishes.

baseRows.title: Final cleanup & walkthrough
baseRows.description: Complete punch work, cleanup, and final customer review.

row.title: Layout changes & rough-ins
row.description: Complete plumbing and electrical rough changes needed for the updated bathroom layout before finish work starts.

row.title: Walls & waterproofing prep
row.description: Prep backing, wall surfaces, and wet-area protection so the finish tile work has a clean installation base.

row.title: Tile & waterproofing finish
row.description: Install tile finishes, seal wet areas, and complete the detailed waterproofing work included in the remodel scope.

actions.title: Vanity, fixtures & trim
actions.template: Include wall touch-up and non-tile surface prep needed before the fixture phase.

baseRows.title: Measurements & prep
baseRows.description: Confirm cabinet layout, site readiness, and delivery staging.

baseRows.title: Cabinet installation
baseRows.description: Install and secure new cabinets in the planned configuration.

baseRows.title: Hardware & adjustments
baseRows.description: Align doors and drawers, install hardware, and complete trim adjustments.

baseRows.title: Final walkthrough
baseRows.description: Review fit and finish, cleanup, and confirm punch items with the customer.

row.title: Demo & site prep
row.description: Remove existing cabinetry if needed, protect surrounding finishes, and prepare the space for the new cabinet install.

row.title: Hardware, fillers & trim
row.description: Install pulls, fillers, panels, and trim pieces that complete the cabinetry scope.

row.title: Alignment & final adjustments
row.description: Align doors and drawers, fine tune reveals, and complete final fit checks before walkthrough.

row.title: Alignment & adjustments
row.description: Align doors and drawers, confirm fit, and complete final adjustment work without hardware or trim installation scope.

baseRows.title: Template & prep
baseRows.description: Confirm measurements, protect work areas, and prep cabinet surfaces.

baseRows.title: Countertop installation
baseRows.description: Install countertops, seams, and edge details.

baseRows.title: Sink & fixture reconnect
baseRows.description: Reconnect sink and finish related countertop details.

baseRows.title: Cleanup & walkthrough
baseRows.description: Complete cleanup, seal where needed, and review the finished install.

baseRows.title: Delivery & staging
baseRows.description: Stage appliances, verify openings, and prep the install area.

baseRows.title: Installation
baseRows.description: Set appliances in place and complete all required connections.

baseRows.title: Testing & adjustments

baseRows.title: Cleanup & customer review
baseRows.description: Clean the area and review operation and handoff details with the customer.

row.title: Disconnect & haul-away
row.description: Disconnect existing appliances safely, remove them from the work area, and prep the site for the new installation.

row.title: Utility prep
row.description: Prepare required hookups, shutoffs, or connection points so the appliance installation can proceed cleanly.

row.title: Installation
row.description: Set appliances in place, complete final hookups, and secure the finished installation once utilities are ready.

baseRows.title: Cleanup & final review

row.title: Protection & roof prep

row.title: Deck repair allowance
row.description: Complete minor decking repairs or spot replacement where needed before the roofing system is closed in.

baseRows.title: Prep & materials

baseRows.title: Flooring installation

baseRows.title: Trim & cleanup

row.title: Demo & disposal

row.title: Subfloor prep & leveling
row.description: Complete subfloor repairs, patching, or leveling work needed before finish flooring installation begins.

row.title: Surface readiness check
